title: Fix lichen-node feature-matrix builds
description: Discovered while validating project-LICHEN-2auf.44. On local main d156a2e74, cargo test -p lichen-node --all-features fails before RPL tests because rust/lichen-node/src/dispatch.rs imports both defmt::warn and log::warn under the same macro name. cargo test -p lichen-node also fails in the default no_std configuration because hybrid.rs imports std-gated GradientTable and hybrid.rs/routing.rs call unavailable f32/f64 sin/cos methods. Fix the crate feature gating and logging macro selection without weakening tests.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p lichen-node, cargo test -p lichen-node --features std, cargo test -p lichen-node --all-features, and all-feature Clippy pass; three independent reviews pass.
notes: Completed on integration/node-feature-recovery from d156a2e74. Fixed defmt/log precedence, std/no_std GradientTable gating, no_std libm math, scheduler diagnostics/dead-code warning, and two required lichen-schc strict-Clippy blockers plus unused vector field. Final gates: lichen-node default 29 tests, std 122, all-features 122; node all-feature/all-target Clippy -D warnings; thumbv7em-none-eabi/eabihf no-default checks; lichen-schc 51 tests and all-feature/all-target Clippy; git diff --check. Three closure reviews: no correctness findings; one scope opinion rejected because SCHC fixes are direct prerequisites for node all-feature Clippy acceptance. No AWS required.
close_reason: All requested default/std/all-feature tests, strict Clippy, no-default ARM checks, SCHC prerequisite gates, and three reviews pass.
